advisory_email.subject: [WARNING] Compliance Advisory: GST Advisory: New Invoice Management System (IMS) - April 2026
advisory_email.body:
{
  "subject": "GST Advisory: Implementation of New Invoice Management System (IMS) - April 2026",
  "body": "Dear Arvind Shah, 

As a manufacturing and export entity, Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd. is required to comply with the new GST Advisory regarding the implementation of the Invoice Management System (IMS) to ensure accurate GST filing. This applies to your company specifically due to its involvement in both domestic and international transactions.

To comply with the GST Advisory, please take the following actions:
1. Implement the new Invoice Management System (IMS) for GST filing as per the GST Advisory.

The deadline for implementation is 2026-04-01. Given the high risk level associated with non-compliance, we urge you to prioritize this implementation to avoid potential penalties.

Please do not hesitate to contact us if you require any assistance with the implementation process. We are committed to supporting your company's compliance needs.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}

alerts.obligation_type: CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27
alerts.headline: REMINDER — CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27 due in 11 day(s) (2026-04-07)
alerts.recommended_action: Prepare and file before 2026-04-07. Not specified in circular

advisory_email.subject: [WARNING] Compliance Advisory: CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27
advisory_email.body:
{
  "subject": "Compliance Advisory: CBDT Circular on TDS Rate Revision for FY 2026-27",
  "body": "Sunita Rao,
Sunrise Finserv NBFC Ltd.

Re: CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27

This circular applies to your company as a Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC) as it requires awareness of the revised TDS rates for FY 2026-27.

Please note the following actions:

1. Be aware of the revised TDS rates for FY 2026-27 as per the CBDT circular.
2. No immediate action is required at this time.

**Important Deadline:** The CBDT circular is effective from 1st April 2026, and you are required to be aware of the revised TDS rates by 7th April 2026.

Please note that the risk level for this circular is LOW, and no penalty is specified in the circular.

If you have any questions or require assistance with compliance, please do not hesitate to contact us. We are here to support you.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}

advisory_email.body:
{
  "subject": "Compliance Advisory: CBDT Circular on TDS Rate Revision for FY 2026-27",
  "body": "Suresh Pillai, Spice Garden Restaurant,

We are writing to bring to your attention the CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27, which affects your business as a Food & Beverage establishment. As per the circular, this revision is applicable to all entities, including restaurants, that are required to deduct Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) on payments made to suppliers.

The required actions for Spice Garden Restaurant are as follows:

1. Note for awareness: No immediate action is required at this time.
2. Monitor the circular for any future updates or changes.

Please note that the deadline for compliance is **April 7, 2026**. Although the risk level is LOW, we recommend reviewing the circular to ensure you are aware of any changes.

If you have any questions or concerns regarding this circular or require assistance with compliance, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}

advisory_email.subject: [WARNING] Compliance Advisory: CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27
advisory_email.body:
{
  "subject": "Compliance Advisory: CBDT Circular on TDS Rate Revision for FY 2026-27",
  "body": "Amit Verma,

We are writing to bring to your attention the CBDT Circular on TDS Rate Revision for FY 2026-27. As a stock broker, Galaxy Securities Pvt. Ltd. is required to deduct tax at source (TDS) on various transactions, and this circular affects the TDS rates applicable to your business.

Please note that no immediate action is required for Galaxy Securities Pvt. Ltd. at this time. However, we recommend that you review the circular and ensure compliance with the revised TDS rates as and when applicable.

The required actions are as follows:

1. Review the CBDT Circular on TDS Rate Revision for FY 2026-27.
2. Familiarize yourself with the revised TDS rates applicable to your business.

The deadline for compliance is **April 7, 2026**.

Please note that the risk level for this circular is LOW, and no penalty is specified in the circular.

If you require any assistance or have any questions regarding this circular, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}
